value.found_quote: The Sora web and app experiences were discontinued on April 26, 2026. The Sora API will be discontinued on September 24, 2026.
value.rationale: The page confirms that OpenAI did offer Sora (substantiating its existence as an OpenAI product), but the page is specifically about its discontinuation. The Sora web and app experiences were shut down on April 26, 2026, and the API is being discontinued on September 24, 2026. This means the offering existed but is now sunset/being sunset — not currently active.
